title: filago pyramidata subsp. lutescens
intro: Filago pyramidata subsp. lutescens, also known as the yellow-flowered fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Filago pyramidata subsp. lutescens can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or salves, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
